lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, what are you doing here, so far from home?

lines.speaker: Captain Ninto
lines.text: I'm enjoyn' the local hoschpitalieee. hee hee.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looks like you've enjoyed more than your fair share of hospitality.

lines.speaker: Captain Ninto
lines.text: tee hee, I probblie schoodn' 'av anuva drinkie right now. But dis dwarven beer ish kind of moreish after the fiff pint.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd go easy on the dwarven stout if I were you.

lines.speaker: Captain Ninto
lines.text: I yousht to be a tesht pilot yoo know. I reeel hero.

lines.speaker: Captain Ninto
lines.text: But I loscht my bottle. Scho I now ffind scholiss in the bottle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened? Did you have a glider crash or get attacked by huge flying birds or something?

lines.speaker: Captain Ninto
lines.text: Naaah, I realished I woz scared ov heightsh.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, I can see that would be a problem ... You should keep an eye on your drinking, though.

lines.speaker: Captain Ninto
lines.text: Aaa shomefing ter go wiv my beer. Thish dwarf beerz quite shtrong you know...

lines.speaker: Captain Ninto
lines.text: Here you go, have a dashing pilot's scarf.

lines.speaker: Captain Ninto
lines.text: I have some spare goggles, you might as well have them.

lines.speaker: Captain Ninto
lines.text: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
